Kidney Stone Analysis 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a kidney stone analysis? 
Kidney stones are small, pebble-like pieces of material that form in one or both of your kidneys. Your kidneys are two bean-shaped organs just below your rib cage. They keep your body's balance of water, minerals, and salts by removing waste to make urine (pee). Kidney stones form when you have high levels of some minerals or salts
